parameters.query:
INSERT INTO events (event_type, source_system, source_flow, error_message, error_stack, payload, processed_at)
VALUES (
  'WORKFLOW_ERROR',
  'n8n',
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO events (event_type, source_system, source_flow, error_message, error_stack, payload, processed_at)
VALUES (
  'WORKFLOW_ERROR',
  'n8n',
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;

SELECT COUNT(*) as recent_count
FROM events
WHERE event_type::text = 'WORKFLOW_ERROR'
  AND source_flow = $1
  AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes';

parameters.text:
=⚠️ *Transient Error*

Workflow: `{{ $('Classify Error').first().json.workflow_name }}`
Node: `{{ $('Classify Error').first().json.error_node }}`
Fehler: {{ $('Classify Error').first().json.error_message }}

_Wird beim naechsten Durchlauf automatisch wiederholt._

parameters.jsCode:
// Duplicate suppressed - more than 3 errors from same workflow in 30 min
return [{ json: { status: 'suppressed', workflow: $('Classify Error').first().json.workflow_name } }];
